name: Trial of the Fighter
description: The Fighter's Guild is seeking new recruits. Speak to Guildmaster Brogan to begin your trial.

stages.description: Speak to Guildmaster Brogan at the Fighter's Guild Hall.
Defeat 5 enemies to prove your combat worth.

name: The Shadow's Test
description: The Thieves' Guild operates in the shadows. Find their hidden den and prove your worth.

stages.description: Find the Thieves' Guild Den and speak to Shadowmaster Vex.

name: The Arcane Examination
description: The Mage's Guild accepts only those of arcane aptitude. Speak to Archmage Seraphel.

stages.description: Speak to Archmage Seraphel at the Mage's Guild Hall.
Deliver a Mana Potion to Archmage Seraphel as proof of craft interest.

name: The Test of Faith
description: The Cleric's Guild seeks devout souls. Speak to High Priest Aldric.

stages.description: Speak to High Priest Aldric at the Cleric's Guild Hall.
Bring a Minor Health Potion as an offering.

name: The Grove's Call
description: The Druid Circle seeks those attuned to nature. Find Elder Sylvara at the Druid Grove.

stages.description: Speak to Elder Sylvara at the Druid Grove Hall.
Bring 5 Wild Herbs as an offering to the grove.

name: The Master Smith's Challenge
description: Prove your forging mastery. Scholar Ivar at the Grand Library of the Smith challenges you to forge a legendary blade.

stages.description: Speak to Scholar Ivar at the Grand Library of the Smith.
Bring 4 Mithril Ingots to the forge.
Forge the Mithril Sword and return it to Scholar Ivar.
Return the Mithril Sword to Scholar Ivar.

name: The Scholar's Grand Tour
description: Visit all 10 libraries and speak to each scholar. Knowledge is power.

stages.description: Visit all 10 libraries and speak to each scholar.
